prompt: An authentic 1890s Art Nouveau botanical illustration of a single stylized plant. The plant's stem grows upward and perfectly splits into binary branches at every node, dividing again and again. At the very tips of the final branches are either distinct red or blue berries. The art style features flowing, elegant whiplash curves, a muted organic color palette of sage green and ochre, flat decorative composition, and vintage lithograph paper texture. No text, no modern diagrams, no labels.
tradition_approach: I targeted the flowing, asymmetrical 'whiplash' curves, muted organic palettes, and flat, stylized lithographic textures to represent the binary branching algorithm as an elegant, decorative botanical plate.
